final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial illustration of a spring sakura campus scene with a schoolgirl in sailor uniform.

Style/medium: needs a "清新日系" (fresh Japanese-style) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the schoolgirl as focal subject with teaching building behind
Subject: must include a young woman wearing 水手服 (sailor uniform), with hair gently moved by breeze
Scene/backdrop: must include a school teaching building (教学楼) during sakura season with pink cherry blossoms falling
Lighting/mood: must be bright sunny day with fresh youthful atmosphere
Color palette: needs a pink-dominant spring direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
